segment-text: A Bling Unplugged & Fox Star Studios Production
Dialogues Sanyuktha Chawla Shaikh
DRAFT 24 - APRIL 7TH,2015 [PRE-SHOOT DRAFT]
EXT. KARACHI AIRPORT/BARRICADE - NIGHT Super: 4th SEPTEMBER 1986 - 9:00 PM KARACHI

Birds eye view of Karachi airport. Fully staffed, air planes waiting to take off, cargo being unloaded, luggage trucks driving across, a plane in a distance gently taxing into the runway. The visual sharpens as we switch to a binocular POV.
A Board reads - KARACHI INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT

The binocular pans - Lax airport security staff, saunter about, without the alertness and pace expected at an airport. The binocular pans again and focuses on a small half closed gate- the guards exchange peanuts/snacks chat facing away from the half open gate, leaving the entry easily accessible.
EXT. BUILDING TERRACE NEAR KARACHI AIRPORT - NIGHT

Binoculars are put down to reveal AL TURK (45) Stern expression on an intelligent and experienced face. He checks time on his wrist-watch- 9:35 PM. He moves swiftly, gets into a car and drives away, leaving behind a cloud of dust
EXT. NEERJA'S BUILDING COMPOUND - NIGHT MUMBAI - 9:30 PM.
A taxi comes to halt outside a residential complex as we hear a girl's giggle
Poocho kitni baar? Saat baar! hall
mein! Anand ki toh ek ek line aati
Waah waah mere mureed As the girl turns to the taxi driver, we reveal NEERJA BHANOT (23) Big naughty eyes, her natural beauty accentuated by a bright toothy smile.
Mureed? Who's Mureed? Im Neerja
The taxi driver sticks his head out as she steps out
TAXI DRIVER
Arre, mureed maane fan. Jaise ki hum hai yusuf saab ke, maane Dilip

(delighted) Oh, that's true ! woh toh mai hoon Jatin Khanna maane Rajesh Khanna ki. Acha toh hum chalte hain (she sings) She laughs as she pays him some extra money. TAXI DRIVER (O.S.) Thank you didi, allah lambi umr
(Rajesh Khanna style) Zindagi badi honi chahiye, lambi nahi babumoshai!
The taxi driver waves and drives away, Neerja enters the
EXT. COMMON COMPOUND, NEERJA'S BUILDING COMPLEX - MOMENTS
Neerja walks towards the large garden area, a big banner
reads 'ANNUAL GALA NIGHT'

Everyone is sitting looking bored, the stage is occupied by children dancing to a nursery rhyme. Some people are snacking on samosas, cake with paper plates in their hands and some having Rasna/other colored cold-drink. Neerja's mother RAMA [(45) classic good looks compromised by a constant frown] is helping the building watchman balance 3-4 snacks and samosa filled paper plates and giving him some instructions about sharing it with others. Neerja spots her father HARISH BHANOT [(48) serious looking man with gentle smile] sitting with a few sameaged men. One of Harish's friends spots Neerja walking with a bag and purse. Aa gayi aapki 3D.
(really happy to see her) Daddy's darling daughter!
Oho! khul gayi halwai ki dukaan, aap dono ke dekhte dekhte diabetes ho jaana hain mereko Tipsy the dog runs up to Neerja and starts jumping for her attention.
Shoot kaisa tha? Kitni tired lag rahi ho, ghar chale jao beta
Rama enters and takes the frisky Tipsy from Neerja.
Acha hua aa gayi Lado, pareshaan kar diya hain sab ne poochte poochte, Neerja kahaa hain, Neerja kab aayegi, thak gayi hoon mai
HARISH: Kaam karke aayi yeh, aur thak gayi hai aap?
Neerja laughs as she takes some wafers from her dad's plate and munches on it.
Wafers kyun khaa rahi hain? Bhook lagi hain? Paronthia ni khaai? Aur fruit? Maine sab diya toh tha dabbo mein!
(clearly lying) Haan mamma sab khaaya maine.
She and her father share a look and Neerja quickly makes
Uff, sab itna dull dull hain yahaan! Lets get this party started, with Kaka ji !

Neerja opens her bag and removes a walkman from inside and moves away as Rama places tipsy down. The camera stays on the mother as she removes the casserole in Neerja's bag and removes the paratha (that Neerja hadn't eaten) and feeds it to Tipsy. Neerja is at the place where Sharma Sound System's DJ is playing some nursery rhyme as the kids are continuing to just stroll around on stage/dance area. Neerja shuts the tape and taking the mike...
Bacha party, very good, now go, (she turns to the building kid)

Neerja then removes the cassette from the walkman. It reads 'My Fav Rajesh Khanna Songs' and puts it in one of the slots in the dual tape recorder connected to the speaker. She plays a song then immediately stops and rewinds it and plays it again and 'Bye Bye miss goodnight' starts playing. She pulls the first set of old people sitting in the front row
C'mon everyone!

Neerja continues to get everyone on their feet and is not taking a no from a few people hesitant to get into the act. Her mother and Father laugh and are telling their friends that there is no point resisting. Neerja, facing the people standing is coaxing them to follow her lead and shows them Rajesh Khanna's steps. The song continues as we see the people losing quite a bit of their inhibitions and following Neerja as she continues to dance. She tells her Dad to hold her from behind and signals her mother to do the same. The people get the lead and a train-chain has been formed. People laughing, smiling, enjoying. Neerja's smile and exuberance is infectious. Amidst all this she spots her oldest brother AKHIL mixing some alcohol from a miniature bottle into a glass. She catches him in the act. sneaking a cigarette, catches him in the act. AKHIL (26) handsome and shy is scared of his younger sister as she has a stern look on her face. Neerja shakes her head as we see a flash and she turns in that direction to see that it is ANEESH(24) cuter younger version of HARISH BHANOT, take the picture. She pulls them both to join the train chain. Music continues, so does the laughter and Rajesh Khanna steps. The Bhanot family looks like a happy family together as Rama begins dancing and Neerja copies her. It is very evident that Neerja is a reflection of her mother. Neerja giggles as she returns to the performance area. Neerja takes the lead once again, paying a genuine ode to her favorite movie star, singing the song loudly and dancing in the quintessential Rajesh Khanna style. Everyone claps and cheers her
EXT. KARACHI MARKET STREET - NIGHT KARACHI 10:00 PM

A car comes to a halt near a market road. Al Turk approaches a crowded biryani stall. The MAN serving some customers immediately spots Al-Turk and calls out to an assistant to assist the customers. Al-Turk takes a corner table in the dingy shop as the MAN comes to take the order. Al-Turk looks up at the MAN and [almost cryptically] orders. AL-TURK:
Chaar plate biryani. Special waali

The MAN walks out of the frame as Al-Turk continues to sit there staring at the busy stall in front of him. The MAN breaks his gaze as he places a polythene bag on the table, and another bag near Al-Turk's feet. Al-Turk without checking the contents picks both those bags and places a thick wad of notes on the table and walks out. The MAN quickly picks up the bundle of notes and puts them in his Kurta pocket.
INT. NEERJA'S HOUSE- NIGHT

The television is on. Harish, Rama (removing her jewelry and placing it on the table in front of her), Akhil and Aneesh are laughing as Neerja manages a glass of water and at the same time imitating her mother dance.
Hai na bhaiyaa? aisi hi dance kar rahi thi na mamma
Pare hutt bandar.. soja thodi der, thakti nai hai tu?
Neerja picks tipsy in her arms and begins petting it. Aneesh takes a 'Stardust' Magazine and begins flipping through it.
Arre haan! Sona chahiye thodi der! mamma aap mujhe thodi der mein utha doge please?
Tu woh le le na, sick leave. Poora din shoot karke aayi hain....
Nahi ma jaana padhega..Shanti ne already chutti li hai.
Then Neerja looks at Aneesh busy with the magazine.
Aneesh bhaiyya yeh magazine mere liye baahar hi chhod dena please.
(looking at her weirdly) Tu vaapas aake ke padh lena.
Please bhaiyya. Mujhe plane mein padhni hai.
Plane mein ni padhegi toh
gets back to his magazine.
Kanjoos. chalo main sonay jaa rahi hoon.
Just as she is leaving, a TVC featuring Neerja begins to play on the tele. Akhil calls out to her and she stops to watch the ad.
Lado dekh! Teri ad! Kitni aunty
Neerja sticks her tongue out in response to her brother's teasing and enters the bedroom.
Akhil and Aneesh look at each other and laugh.
INT. BAKERY/HOUSE - NIGHT KARACHI 10:30 PM
Two young boys Fahad and Mansoor - [both just about 18 years old] new found moustache and beard slightly growing on their young faces. Fahad is munching on a piece of bread.

(in Arabic) Bhai Bhook lagi hai. MANSOOR: (in Arabic) Kab se intezaar kar rahe hain Safirini- the 25 year old man looking out through the window doesn't pay heed to them but another man Khalil [25] big built, bearded face and drugged out eyes looks at the two boys with disdain.
Both the boys are almost scared of his glare.
(stern-steely tone) Khana aa jaayega

Safirini spots the headlights of a car and turns back to the trio. His weary, withered face looks older than the age of 25. His demeanor and body-language clearly suggests that he is the mentor/leader of the trio sitting there. He turns away from the window.
INT/EXT. BAKERY - NIGHT

Al-turk arrives in an auto rickshaw and we see a van parked outside [the Pakistan Airport Security Van which we will establish later]. He gets off with two bags in his hand, enters a shop where a few men in baniyan and lungi are stomping on big pieces of dough. They don't pay any attention to Al-turk; as if he is a regular there. He continues walking inside into a small passage that leads to a makeshift door. He knocks thrice.
INT. BAKERY/HOUSE - NIGHT

Fahad and Mansoor look expectantly as Khalil opens the door and in enters Al-Turk with the bags. Fahad and Mansoor get up from the corner they are sitting in and go to the table where the bags are kept. The young boys get the biryanis out while on the same table Khalil and Safirini take out the contents of the other bagguns, rifle barrels, C4 bars and bullets. The normalcy of the food and guns being removed side by side is quite scary.
INT. NEERJA'S HOUSE- LIVING ROOM - NIGHT 5TH SEPTEMBER 1986 1:00 am

Rama is kneading dough in the kitchen. We can see potatoes and some green vegetables already prepped to make parathas. Rama looks at the clock it reads 1:00 AM Rama walks into the living room as she unties her apron. She looks at the wall clock again, Harish is working busily on his typewriter. He looks up
Mujhe pataa hain tum kya soch rahi ho, dus minute sone dogi toh daant padhegi.
Ae wi theek hain,
INT. NEERJA'S HOUSE/BEDROOM- NIGHT
Rama enters the room, puts the light on and gently wakes Neerja. Tipsy following Rama jumps on the bed and begins waking Neerja by licking her face. Neerja grumbles.
Tch Tipsy! Mamma please, sone do,
(gently carrying tipsy and putting it down)
Le! Soja, kissi ne roka hain Rama starts to leave, Neerja pulls her to the bed, and puts her head in her lap. Rama settles her hair affectionately
Aise mazdooron jaise kaam karna jaroori hain? Modelling enni changi chal rahi hain teri, yeh air hostess job chhod kyun ni
Mamma I love my air hostess job
Yehi toh saara siyappa hain! Tere flight pe chadte hi blood pressure high ho jaanda hain mera. Tera plane utaarta hain uske saath mera pressure.
Aur samose khao meri flight ko blame karo, maine dekha toh aapko kal, teen khaaye na?
Neerja turns away giggling
She pulls Neerja back
INT. INTERCUTS BETWEEN NEERJA'S HOUSE BEDROOM AND BAKERY HOUSE

Neerja putting her make-up on. Fahad and Mansoor washing their faces. Neerja wearing her uniform. Khalil, Fahad and Mansoor wearing some uniform as Al-turk and Safirini watch them. Safirini is dressed in a pathani with a waist-coat.

Reveal the Karachi men's uniform read Pakistan Airport Neerja checks her bag and shuts the suitcase The Karachi men shut a heavy trunk with guns and grenades in it. Safirini, Khalil, Fahad, Mansoor and Al-turk are standing in a circle and and saying the Martyr's prayer
INT. NEERJA'S HOUSE - NIGHT
Neerja sits with her head bowed, in front of a big idol of Goddess Durga. Rama appears from behind
INT. NEERJA'S HOUSE- NIGHT
C/u of Neerja's hand held by Rama, its bare.

Kya matbal mil ni ri? Mai keya si na, uttarna nai hain iss ring ko Neerja exchanges a look with Harish sitting at the table, Rama tosses Neerja's hand away. Neerja is packing her vanity bag with the contents that are currently on the table. Make-up, lip-stick, hair accessories, etc. She remembers some VHS tapes, puts them in a plastic bag and shoves them in her big bag. Rama displeased, walks into the kitchen and gets some freshly cooked parathas and places it on the table. Neerja is wearing her lipstick as Rama continues..
Toofaan mail jaise phirna hain, yaa se waa, itne kaam kar leti hain din mein, ek ring ni sambhaal sakti? Maine pandit ji se special teri safety ke liye li thi
(rajesh khanna style) Arey meri pyaari maa..agar yeh hota toh voh nahi hota aur agar voh nahi hota toh shaayad yeh bhi nahi hota..hota toh vohi hai na jo ho na hota hai..kya samjhe.
Neerja takes her lipstick and pretends to apply it on Rama's lips as Rama irritated, pushes Neerja's hands
Waah kaka ji! kaunsi film ka
(still rajesh khanna style) Arey nadaan yeh toh original hai re.
Harish and Neerja laugh.
(irritated) Humor sense kitta jyaada changa hain aap dono ki Hehe
(giggling) Mamma humor sense nai, sense of humor! And I'll be safe I promise

The conversation is interrupted by a car horn Neerja quickly gets up from her seat, plants swift kisses on her parents cheeks and is about to run out when her mother stops her and gives her yogurt and sugar. Neerja gulps it and hurries out of the house with her bags in tow.
Parothian khud bhi kha lena, sab
remembering)Hai rabba! Laado tera toh birthday hain 7 ko, miss ho jaayega!
Neerja gets her shoes from the shoe rack and starts putting them on
Mamma birthday New York mein! Lekin mera gift leke rakhna! bhoolna mat Ok Bye
Arre par chaiye kya...
Daatne mein itne busy ho ke yeh bhi yaad nahi, maine dikhaya tha na woh yellow waala salwar suit? Mujhe wahi waala chaiye mamma, jiske dupatta mein woh chamki tha..
Acha Haan! mai kal hi le aaongi, dhyaan se jaane beta, bye Neerja rushes out waving
Rama and Harish walk to the window and look at Jaideep (29) handsome, shy is waiting for Neerja. He spots them and waves to them from below-nervously smiling.
(pensive) Mujhe Jaideep ke baare mein pehle hi soch lena tha Rama, Lado ke liye isse behtar ladka nahi ho sakta, pataa nahi kyun maine uss Naresh se..

Rama looks at her husband's guilt-ridden face and lovingly smiles at him. She places her hands on his and begins sweetly singing 'Ajeeb Dastan hai yeh...' Both of them watch Jaideep and Neerja drive away
INT. BAKERY/HOUSE- NIGHT KARACHI - 1:40 AM
Al-turk looks at his watch. AL-TURK:

Mansoor and Fahad pick the heavy trunk and follow Khalil outside. Safirini walks up to Al-turk. Safirini and Al-turk are in a serious conversation as Safirini is fidgeting with something under his kurta.
(in Arabic) Mansoor aur Fahad theek se kar paayenge? Training poori hain na inki?
Safirini takes the last sip from his cup trying to hide the concern on his face.
(in Arabic) Haan Haan, kaam ke pakke hain dono, Mujhe yahaan poori tafseel milti rahegi, Ab hum milenge Cyprus mein Safirini keeps the cup on the table.
EXT. OUTSIDE BAKERY/HOUSE- NIGHT

Khalil is watching the boys place the trunk in the back of a van. The camera reveals- Pakistan Airport Security written on it. All of them get into the car with Khalil in the driver's seat. Khalil shuts the door.
INT/EXT. CAR/BOMBAY ROADS - NIGHT
Jaideep is driving and Neerja is seated next to him. She is winding a un-spooled cassette with a pen. Their body language clearly suggests that they are very comfortable with each other.
(Russian accent) I want to stay home and sleep, but instead I have to go on plane and serve strangers like they are family.
Bade exposed ho gaye ho Babumoshai! Hanste hi rahoge ke kuch bologe bhi? Ab mujhe german accent mein batao tumhara din kaisa tha
din baut busy tha, Accent mujhe aata nahi,
Waise toh mujhe bolne ka mauka nahi dete, humesha airport ke raaste pe hi itna chup kyun ho
(teases) Woh issiliye kyunki mai tumhe bahut dhyaan se sunta hoon How sweet!
NEERJA:
Mai ek baar full and final samajh jaana chahta hoon ke tumhari awaaz ka kaunsa part mujhe sabse zyaada annoying lagta hain, tone, volume, accent
Haww! Is this true? meri awaaz itni annoying hain ke uska analysis karna hain
(dead serious)
Neerja sulks
But.. its very strange, jab tum nahi hoti na, toh mujhe tumhari awaaz hi sabse zyaada yaad aati
Haan haan kaan mein bajne waali annoying awaaz
Arre nahi, tumhari awaaz mujhe kaan se nahi dil se sunai deti hain babumoshai, I miss you and always with your annoying voice
Tum mujhe miss karte ho Of course! Oh
oh ! aage se left jaldi!
Lekin airport? Please please do minute
LONG SHOT OF THE CAR TAKING THE LEFT TURN.
INT. CAR/HOARDING SITE - NIGHT
Neerja and Jaideep have halted. Neerja turns to Jaideep and smiles
dekho mai bahut ache ghar ka ladka hoon, I dont like where this is going.
Neerja giggles she whacks him playfully and points out of her window. Jaideep moves closer to her to see where she is pointing Tadaa! See!
Jaideep turns to see it is a huge BENZER hoarding of Neerja as a bride. Jaideep briefly taken by how beautiful she looks, breaks the moment
Itna bhi nahi miss karoonga tumhe
STRAINS OF LOVE SONG BEGINS
present
He gets a few chocolates and a letter out of a the glove compartment, he gives only the chocolates first
(British accent) Wow snickers! my favorite! Oh but Jai-Deep how daft are you? Daft?? pataa hain kitni mehnat
(french accent) Serves you right mes cherie, you give chocolates to a air hostess, one I have to watch my weight, two I travel the world and can get these anytime. What is that in your hand?
She points to the sealed envelope in his hand.
(with purpose) Yeh tum sirf aur sirf apne birthday pe khol sakti ho, aur chocolates wapis kar do, tumhe toh kahi bhi kabhie bhi mil sakti hain
He gives her the letter. She takes the letter and the
(italian accent) Dont be rude, you cannot take back a gift, stupid man. Now drive, I am late! Drive I say! (rajesh khanna accent) Oh chal na re, nahi toh late ho jaayenge re Jaideep drives chuckling
By the way, you make a beautiful bride Babumoshai.

Neerja gives him a perfunctory smile and stares out of the window as they drive away. LOVE SONG SHOTSNeerja continues to talk and giggle as Jaideep reacts, smiles and listens to her. C/U of Neerja tenderly holding the chocolates and the letter - maybe her fingers grazing the envelope as if curious to know what is written in it. Jaideep asks for a chocolate as he is feeling hungry and she cutely refuses as if saying they are all mine.
EXT. OUTSIDE SAHAR INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT - NIGHT MUMBAI 2:25 AM

LOVE SONG CONTINUES The car door opens- Jaideep and Neerja have reached the airport. Jaideep removes the one small bag and then picks her Vanity bag. He pretends to be dragged down by the weight of that bag.
Ooh! Badaa bhaari bag hain bhai!
(laughs) Tumhe kya lagta hain? aise lagna (she gestures to herself) chota mota kaam hain?
Mujhe lagta hain tumhare liye toh kaam hi nahi hain
Neerja blushes, they both look at each other and smile. Neerja picks her bags. Slight nervous silence between them.
Acha toh hum chalte hain!
(looks at his watch) Ruko abhi time hain, its 2:27, three minutes more
Neerja [face away from Jaideep] smiles and then turns.
(smiling naughtily) teen minute mein kya ho jaayega ? (rajesh khanna style) Kissi badi khushi ke intezaar mein hum yeh choti choti khushiyoon ke mauke kho dete hain
Bawarchi! wow you watched a Rajesh Khanna Film! Great!
(whispers) Tum jaanti nahi lekin Kaka ji mere liye bahut badaa kaam karne waale
(mocking) Acha? Woh kaise?

Jaideep looks at her with a lover's yearning, admiring her childlike laughter. He is about to tell her something when they are interrupted by two young girls- Tina and Debina[22-24 years old], dressed in Pan-Am air-hostess uniforms, almost identical looking because of the make-up and hair-style. Suddenly Neerja is blushing and slightly on guard.
Hi Jaideep, Tina humaari kismet mein toh khadoos company drivers hi likhe hai, don't you wish humaara bhi pick up itna cute hota
Jaideep blushes
chalo we are late!
She pulls Neerja
C'mon! Bye Jaideep!
Neerja caught between colleagues at the last moment manages only a sideways embrace with Jaideep, his face falls
Half-hug? Really? Pst (she points her chin to Tina

and Debina and makes a sad face) She quickly turns to see Tina and Debina laughing at her as she walks towards the entrance of the airport. Jaideep is waiting for her to turn back and he suddenly remembers something.
(calls out) Neerja, Letter! birthday pe kholna!
But Neerja doesn't turn and he watches her walk inside. Slightly disappointed he turns back when suddenly he is surprised by arms around his neck- Neerja's. She hugs him tight and whispers
Letter birthday pe hi kholoongi, I'll miss you, bye
Jaideep happily turns as Neerja makes a cute funny face, lands a quick peck on the lips [surprising Jaideep], and runs back.
Bye bye, miss good night
SCENE CONTINUES EXT/ SAHAR INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT.INT. SAHAR INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT/CHECK-IN AREA- NIGHT

A beaming Neerja walks towards Tina and Debina waiting for her. Both of them smile and look happy for Neerja. As they walk towards the gate leading to the entrance of the airport and wade through the crowd of people in and around the airport, Debina begins talking.
Jaideep is so cute, Neerja ab toh
Kar Le Neerja, nahi toh yeh kar
Everyone laughs, Neerja doesn't pay heed to the joke as she is lost in thought. Debina squeezes Neerja's hand and whispers
Oh C'mmon Neerja, purani baatien bhool ja, be cool. woh shaadi arranged thi, yeh love hain,
zindagi ko ek aur mauka toh de kar
[FLASHBACK 1 BEGINS] INT. DOHA HOUSE, KITCHEN - NIGHT

The kitchen counter is piled with take out boxes. Neerja, still very much the blushing bride, arms covered with the traditional 'chooda' a spot of sindoor on her forehead, is organizing the boxes and pulling out serving trays and bowls. She reacts to some loud laughter from the living room. Just then her husband Naresh (28)serious looking with a no nonsense attitude, appears, he has the bill for the food in his hand, he checks it in disdain.
Tumhari maa bhi aisi hi hain kya?
apne pati se home delivery
For a second Neerja doesn't know how to react but then
Meri mamma bahut acha khana banaati hain!
Toh shaadi se pehlay seekh leti unse. ke tumhe independent banaane ke chakkar mein kuch sikhaya hi
(a little hurt) I promise main jaldi seekh jaaongi.
Problem pataa hain kya hain Neerja, hume apni shakal dikhane ke paise nahi milte, hume mehnat karni padhti hain. Aur dekho, meri

segment-speaker: mehnat ke paise kisme jaa rahe
segment-text: hain? Khana order karne mein. (MORE)
Yeh saara kharcha mein darling daughter ke daddy se vasool karoonga, Khana banaana tak nahi sikhaya tumahri maa ne tumhe Tsk Tsk Tsk
Neerja is stunned. She doesn't know what to say.
Tum har baat mein mamma ko mat
She picks up a plate of food to take it outside. Naresh takes it from her
(angrily) Tum yahi raho, mai le jaaoonga.
Neerja picks up another plate
(trying to make light of the situation) Khaana banaana nahi aata lekin serve toh karna aata hi hai. waise bhi mai tumhare doston ko hi toh bol loon, I don't want to be rude
Naresh extends his arms towards the wall and blocks
Jaisa mai boloon waise karo. Yahi raho, baahar. Mat. Aana. Samjhi. Yeh sab saaf kaun karega?

Naresh continues to glare at a scared Neerja and takes the tray from her hands. Naresh walks out as Neerja is stunned with Naresh's behavior. She starts clearing the counter and throwing empty boxes, wrappers into the bin.
model biwi ko? NARESH (O.S.) maine bola usse aane ko lekin pata nahi kehti hai ussay baahar nahi aana hai. FRIEND (O.S.) Karne de naatak. Nayi nayi shaadi hai na. Dheere dheera line pe le aana usko.
All the friends laugh, Neerja looks hurt.
[FLASHBACK 1 CONTINUES] EXT. DOHA MALL - DAY

Neerja, wearing dark glasses, gets out of the mall carrying two big shopping bags. Her body language isn't that of the happy chirpy girl we are used to seeing so far. She walks up to a small tuck shop at the street corner, the SHOP OWNER (50) cheerful chubby Pakistan man greets her warmly He takes the land phone and places it in front of her, she smiles gratefully and dials
[FLASHBACK 1 CONTINUES] INT. HT OFFICE/ HARISH'S CABINDAY
Neerja's father is giving his feedback about an article to a junior journalist.
Article toh theek hain, lekin tumhe nahi lagta tum kuch important bhool gaye ho?
(smiles) Nahi main waise hi pooch raha hoon.
(unsurely selfcritical) Uhh..sir..punctuation?!
He is about to say something further when the phone rings
INTERCUTS BETWEEN PHONE BOOTH AND OFFICE CABIN
Hello Papa? How are you?
(joy on his face) hello mere 3D, How are you?
Mai..mai theek hoon papa HARISH:
Aaj office mein kaise phone kiya?
Kya hua beta? Is everything ok?
It is clear that there is a lot she wants to talk about but controlling the quiver in her voice she replies
Papa woh mera ad hain agle mahine,
aap uss agency ko phone karke bol
Ek minute ek minute, kyun nahi aaogi beta?
Papa I think I should stop modelling, shaadi ke baad acha nahi lagta yeh sab karna

(surprised) What? Yeh kaisi ajeeb si baatien kar raho ho Laado, kis idiot ne kahaa yeh sab tumhe, Naresh ko bataaya? He'll laugh (he laughs) NEERJA: Papa Naresh ne hi kahaa mujhe, unhe nahi lagta mujhe modelling karni chahiye, aap cancel kardo
Harish gets the vibe of what Neerja is implying.

segment-speaker: HARISH: Bhai yeh toh galat baat hain,
segment-text: we've discussed this. (MORE) HARISH: (CONT'D)

segment-speaker: shaadi se pehle unn sab ne bola
segment-text: tha they will let you work, mai Naresh se baat karoon beta? He'll understand...
(gets frightened at the thought) Nahi papa, please aap Naresh se kuch mat kehna, Please papa, (her voice breaks) Mamma se kehna I miss her, aur Aneesh aur Akhil bhaiya se bhi.
Harish reacts to her tears
